channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Denmark Hill, junction with Red Post Hill. Flyposting on multiple columns., 24th May
item.description:
Please remove.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Herne Hill, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: One thin branch of this tree is hanging down to face level., 24th May
item.description:
One thin branch of this tree is hanging down to face level. I am very short and walked into it. Please can this branch be pruned to a safe height above the pavement.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Croydon Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish, 24th May
item.description:
Dumped rubbish bag now being torn open by animals.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 94, High Street, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing rubbish bin, 24th May
item.description:
Outside john donne opposite cossall park

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Wood's Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Loads of dumped items at cossall park, 24th May
item.description:
Usual spot

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Wood's Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress, 24th May
item.description:
Yet more of the never ending filth dumped on Maple Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 140, Maple Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: My Shed door is broken, 24th May
item.description:
Hi there. My shed door is hanging off at the bottom. Is there anyway we can get this fixed or replaced? Thank you

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cazenove Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Left for months, 24th May
item.description:
These two vehicles have been left here for months, often see drug pickups and encouraging rubbish dumping around area they parked, human faeces and urination also being noticed around these two untaxed vehicles

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mayplace Avenue, Barnes Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rotting furniture dumped on the corner, 24th May
item.description:
Multiple bits of furniture, bin bags, and garden waste dumped on the corner. The no fly-tipping sign clearly isn’t doing the job, need clear it up and make it more off putting.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 39; 41, Kelly Avenue, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress flytipped on Selby Road, 24th May
item.description:
Continuous flytipping on the road in front of this fence, has been going on for weeks now

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 46, Selby Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Disabled parking bay outside No. 22, 24th May
item.description:
Two Lime bikes left on disabled bay preventing its use. Bike No. JPU-HJL and Bike No. DQQ-CCD
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 28, Aberdare Gardens, South Hampstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Clapham Common pond full of dead fish and rubbish, 24th May
item.description:
Clapham Common pond full of dead fish and rubbish - by model yacht club. Health hazard to dogs and people paddling in the pond

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Clapham Common South Side, Clapham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned car., 24th May
item.description:
The abandoned blue Ford car has been blocking the flow of traffic at the junction of Court Road and Middle Park Avenue for almost three weeks. Registration P20AKK. It is untaxed. It may also been uninsured. It has multiple PCN attached to its windscreen.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Footpath From Outside 497-551 Middle Park Avenue Through Parking Area, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 24th May
item.description:
...

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Osbaldeston Road, Hackney, London

item.title: Outside Chalcot Lodge and Kings College Court Adelaide Rd, 24th May
item.description:
Overgrown hedges restricting pavement access. These two blocks of flats are repeat offenders.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 100, Adelaide Road, Belsize Park, Greater London

item.title: Litter picker needed, 24th May
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Green Hundred Road, Peckham, Greater London

item.title: Dulwich Village, front of number 47 (Pharmacy/post office). Suspected abandoned cycle affixed to Sheffield stand., 24th May
item.description:
Please investigate
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dulwich Village, Dulwich Village, Greater London

item.title: Hot spot, 24th May
item.description:
Outside 63 kingsground AGAIN !

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kingsground, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Urine on the stairs and landing, 24th May
item.description:
Random people use our stairs and landing area as a toilet! This is an entrance from Latona Road staircase It stinks, unhygienic and disgusting!🤢 Please disinfect, mop and put some warning signs! We - residents live here!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Glengall Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
